narrative:
Decatur Twp. township has 415 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
